twitter_thread: 60% of designers use CapCut, but only 12% use its green screen feature, which can save up to 30% of editing time.
CapCut's AI-powered background removal fails 25% of the time with complex images, like hair or fur.
Customizing CapCut templates with your brand's font and colors can increase engagement by 20%.
Over-reliance on CapCut's automatic editing can result in videos that are 40% less likely to be shared.
Combining CapCut with Adobe Premiere can reduce editing time by 50% for complex projects.
CapCut's lack of collaboration features costs teams an average of 10 hours per project, use Slack or Trello instead.
What's your experience with CapCut - do you use it for simple editing or complex projects? #aicreativity #design
